summary: AuthPage (/auth) and LoginPage (/login) redesign testing COMPLETE - ALL TESTS PASSED. Mobile: Clean cream layout with text wordmark 'VenuLoQ' (no dark header block), larger form elements (h-[52px]), rounded-xl inputs, pill-shaped Google button, field labels visible. Desktop: Premium split-screen with dark header card (#0B0B0D) + image logo + 3D tilt effect. All auth functionality preserved.

tests.test: NO dark header block on mobile (hidden lg:block)
Subtitle 'Sign in or create your account' visible
'Email' label visible above input on mobile
Email input h-[52px] with rounded-xl visible
Gold CTA 'Continue with Email' button visible
'Admin / RM / Venue Login' link navigates to /login
Split-screen layout (50/50) with hero image left, card right
Hero image from Unsplash with Ken Burns animation
Tagline 'Where Every Celebration Finds Its Perfect Stage' on left
Dark header (#0B0B0D) with image logo visible on card
Email OTP send - click 'Continue with Email' triggers OTP
OTP step appears with 6 input fields (data-testid='auth-otp-input-{0-5}')
'Check your inbox and spam folder' hint visible
Back button returns to email step
Toast shows 'Verification code sent — check your inbox'
NO dark header block on mobile
'Username or Email' label visible above input
Split-screen with abstract dark/gold left panel
Dark header (#0B0B0D) with image logo on card

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - no mocked endpoints

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth pages redesign v2 verified. Key change: Mobile no longer has dark header block - uses text wordmark 'VenuLoQ' on cream background instead. Desktop keeps split-screen with dark header + image logo. Key data-testids: auth-card, auth-brand-logo (mobile text wordmark), auth-welcome-title, auth-google-btn, auth-email-input, auth-send-otp-btn, auth-stay-signed-in, auth-team-login-link, auth-back-btn, auth-close-btn (mobile only), auth-otp-container, auth-otp-input-{0-5}, auth-verify-otp-btn, auth-check-inbox-hint, auth-resend-otp-btn, auth-change-email-btn. Login page: login-card, full-brand-logo (mobile), login-email, login-password, login-toggle-password, login-submit, login-customer-link, login-back-btn, login-close-btn (mobile only). Both pages use framer-motion animations and CSS 3D transforms for tilt effect.
